reviews.review_text: Dr. Shubham stands out as the finest psychologist in Delhi. They offer a benchmark of excellent care, and I recommend their services above all others for psychological well-being.
Dr. Shubham is a highly regarded psychologist in Delhi. I would strongly recommend their services for anyone seeking psychological help. This is one of the best✨ 💖 🌟
Thank you sir. For treating my depression. I had lost hope in my life. But you gave me ray of hope and filled my life with light and dreams. Words can't express my gratitude. Once again thank you sir
Glad that I got therapist like Dr. Shubham. His therapies helped me overcome my anxiety and taught me healthy coping mechanisms which help me in living a better life.

Great place! The doctor is friendly and made me relax throughout the appointment! I came to know about this place through a friend. Doctor had a very polite and friendly behavior along with a neat and sanitized environment. Would definitely recommend to those who are having first psychologist appointment.
reviews.owner_response: Thank you for your honest review dear

reviews.review_text: Really good experience. I have visited him regarding my anxiety issues.

I personally don't prefer to go to psychologists for my problems as when I was in college I had a really bad experience with psychologists (my parents took me to AIIMS previously once for treatment) I hated the rudeness of the doctors that ...

Dr. Shubham Singhal is an outstanding psychologist who truly listens with empathy and offers practical, evidence-based guidance. His compassionate approach, deep understanding of mental health, and clear communication made a significant ...

Really a good psychologist and a friend. He really knows how to make someone open up and very much understanding. Also number of different therapies for same solution so very comfortable to get along with each session 🤗
reviews.owner_response: Thank you dear 🤗 I m glad that I could help

reviews.review_text: Very good psychologist and a very good teacher as well He has been a mentor since my college days Helped me a lot and truly he is fantastic ✨
As per my experience I can say that he is the best, he helped many his sessions. He uses his experiences in his treatment and understands the condition of patient very well.
reviews.owner_response: Thanks for your review dear. I'll do my best 🌸

reviews.review_text: Awesome doctor Guides me well enough that i will solve my problems with the best way to get the normal life back . ...

I joined the sessions with a burden and lot of pressure in my mind and heaviness in my heart but as I discussed everything with the counsellor and now I have a different view towards life and smiling woth my heart 😁 😁
I had depression due to past personal experiences but dr. Shubham helped me a lot in recovery. Thanks mr. Shubham for therapy.
A good listener, attentive and keen counselor. help developing insight so that one can deal better with things.

reviews.review_text: Friendly nature, warm attitude with a good knowledge of psychology. Enjoy his job. Keep it up.

reviews.review_text: Very good therapist and good environment
